completed_tasks.name: check_existing — no CONTEXT.md, no checkpoint, no plans
load_prior_context — read PROJECT.md, REQUIREMENTS.md, STATE.md, Phase 26 CONTEXT.md

remaining_tasks.name: present_gray_areas — present the 4 gray areas via AskUserQuestion (multiSelect)
discuss_areas — default mode: 4 single-question turns per selected area

blockers.description: Context budget exhaustion mid-flow at 77%. No technical blockers — pre-analysis is captured in .continue-here.md so the next session can skip steps 1-7.
blockers.workaround: Resume in fresh session; re-read 5 priority files; jump to present_gray_areas with 4 pre-identified areas.

decisions.rationale: User chose explicit design lock-in over reusing the rich debug doc as context. They want each gray area discussed, not auto-resolved.

decisions.decision: Research enabled for the eventual plan-phase
decisions.rationale: User explicitly chose 'Research first (Recommended)' over --skip-research at the plan-phase gate.

next_action: Run /gsd-discuss-phase 38.2 in fresh session. The resuming agent must: (1) read .planning/phases/38.2-usb-enforcement-fix-blocked-device-io/.continue-here.md FIRST — pre-analysis is complete; (2) re-read the 5 Required Reading files in order (debug doc, Phase 26 CONTEXT, Phase 31 plans + verification, usb_enforcer.rs, device_controller.rs); (3) grep dlp-agent/src/detection/usb.rs and service.rs for usb_wndproc/DeviceController to identify Phase 31's actual wiring point; (4) resume at the present_gray_areas step with the 4 pre-identified areas (wiring failure mode, AGENT-UNKNOWN scope, re-plug/tier-change semantics, drive-letter mislabel scope); (5) write 38.2-CONTEXT.md and 38.2-DISCUSSION-LOG.md; (6) update STATE.md.
context_notes: Mid-discuss-phase for Phase 38.2 (URGENT bug fix — registered blocked USB devices log DENY but writes still succeed). Goal verbatim from ROADMAP: fix the gap where registered blocked devices log DENY but writes succeed; ensure DeviceController::disable_usb_device fires at PnP level for all registered blocked USB devices. Phase requirement: USB-03. Pre-analysis (steps 1-8) is complete and captured in the phase's .continue-here.md. The 4 gray areas are listed there with sub-questions for the user. Highest-impact area is #1 (wiring failure mode) — the next agent should grep for usb_wndproc/DeviceController in detection/usb.rs and service.rs BEFORE asking the user, so concrete code evidence drives the discussion. The notify-based watcher is observe-only; treating its events as enforcement is the live bug. Also surfaced but possibly out of scope for 38.2: AGENT-UNKNOWN agent_id in audit logs, and DISK_DISCOVERY drive-letter mislabel ('C' for a device plugged at F:).
